name: Parallax Depth

params.name: intensity
params.describe: parallax magnitude - subtle (+/-8% drift, premium/calm) or medium (+/-14%). Both clamped so the oversized layer always overscans further than the shift; an edge gap is impossible.

usage_example:
import { ParallaxDepth } from "./component" // A full-bleed section with a parallax background. Pass the background image + your foreground content. export default function Section() { return (

Your on-brief headline

A short supporting line that earns the full-bleed image.

 ) }
license: MIT - Motion (motion.dev), (c) 2024 Motion B.V. (LICENSE.md verified). The `motion` package is already a dependency of preview/app; `motion/react` is its React entrypoint. Free for commercial use.
notes: Depth parallax via Motion useScroll+useTransform. Wraps a section-block of foreground content over a parallax photo background (wraps:section-block). Fills the parallax-slow motion language, which previously had NO primitive - so premium/calm briefs finally get a motion primitive. Ships prefers-reduced-motion freeze + clamped drift with scale-overscan so no edge gap is possible; the agent supplies only image + content + optional intensity.
